img.description: Images must have alt text unless purely decorative (alt='').

button.description: Buttons must have discernible text or an aria-label if icon-only.

a.description: Links must have an href and discernible text.

input.description: Inputs must have a corresponding label (for=id) or aria-label.

interactivity.no_div_buttons: Do not use onClick on divs/spans. Use <button>.
interactivity.focus_visible: Interactive elements must have visible focus styles.
